name: Silk Radiance Foundation
description: A lightweight, buildable foundation with hyaluronic acid and vitamin C for a radiant, dewy finish. Available in 20 shades from Porcelain to Deep Espresso.
ingredients: Water, Cyclopentasiloxane, Hyaluronic Acid, Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid), Niacinamide, Titanium Dioxide, Iron Oxides
skin_type: All skin types, especially dry and combination

name: Velvet Matte Lipstick
description: Ultra-pigmented matte lipstick with a velvety-smooth texture that glides on effortlessly. Infused with shea butter and jojoba oil for all-day comfort without drying.
ingredients: Shea Butter, Candelilla Wax, Jojoba Oil, Vitamin E, Iron Oxides, Red 7, Red 27

name: Cloud Comfort Sneakers
description: Lightweight sneakers engineered with our proprietary CloudFoam™ technology. Features a knit upper for breathability, memory foam insole, and a sleek minimalist design that pairs with everything.
materials: Recycled knit upper, CloudFoam™ midsole, Rubber outsole

name: Glow-Up Vitamin C Serum
description: A potent 20% vitamin C serum combined with ferulic acid and vitamin E. Clinically proven to brighten skin, reduce dark spots, and protect against environmental damage. Suitable for all skin types.
ingredients: 20% L-Ascorbic Acid, Ferulic Acid, Vitamin E (Tocopherol), Hyaluronic Acid, Glycerin

name: The Perfect Blazer
description: A beautifully tailored blazer with a modern relaxed fit. Crafted from premium Italian wool blend with subtle stretch for comfort. Features peak lapels, interior pockets, and a single-button closure.

name: Dewy Setting Spray
description: A fine-mist setting spray that locks in makeup for up to 16 hours while delivering a natural dewy glow. Infused with aloe vera and green tea extract to soothe and hydrate.
ingredients: Water, Aloe Vera Extract, Green Tea Extract, Glycerin, PVP, Phenoxyethanol

name: Cashmere Lounge Set
description: Luxuriously soft cashmere lounge set featuring an oversized crewneck sweater and relaxed-fit joggers. Perfect for elevated comfort at home or casual outings. Ethically sourced Grade-A Mongolian cashmere.

name: Retinol Night Cream
description: An advanced nighttime treatment with encapsulated retinol 0.5% that delivers anti-aging benefits without irritation. Combined with ceramides and squalane to strengthen the skin barrier while you sleep.
ingredients: Encapsulated Retinol 0.5%, Ceramides, Squalane, Bakuchiol, Vitamin E

name: Leather Crossbody Bag
description: A sleek crossbody bag crafted from premium full-grain leather. Features an adjustable strap, secure zip closure, interior card slots, and a minimalist aesthetic that complements any outfit.

name: Hydra-Boost Moisturizer
description: A lightweight yet deeply hydrating moisturizer with triple hyaluronic acid complex and ceramides. Provides 72-hour hydration without feeling greasy. Perfect as a makeup primer or standalone moisturizer.
ingredients: Triple Hyaluronic Acid Complex, Ceramides, Niacinamide, Squalane, Panthenol
